description: Factorial, component, and null ablations (Task 2 protocol; paper tab:ablation). Final values as reported in the paper. mean +/- std over seeds {7, 42, 123, 777, 2024}.
key_findings: Agent structure drives coverage: +13.6 AIPR over the constrained single agent (63.4 vs 49.8) and +13.9 without constraint (65.1 vs 51.2).
The constraint acting with its reward shaping drives safety: FRR 8.9% -> 2.1% (multi), 6.8% -> 2.4% (single), at 1.7 / 1.4 AIPR coverage cost.
The +5.1 AIPR gap over MAPPO-Lagrangian decomposes as ~3.2 points from the shared belief encoder and ~1.9 from role specialization.
Fixing Agents 1-2 always-on costs only 0.5 AIPR points (within noise).
At lambda1 = 5 the trained policy settles at 3.6% FRR despite an active dual: the shaping is load-bearing (see sensitivity_analyses.json).
